description_for_human: Predict how your LinkedIn post will perform before you publish it. Get a GO/WAIT/IMPROVE/NO verdict with estimated impressions.
description_for_model: Reactor predicts LinkedIn post performance. Call POST /v1/predict with {"post": "text"} to get verdict (GO/WAIT/IMPROVE/NO), estimated impressions, debate score, hook score, cringe score, authenticity score, timing multiplier, warnings, and improvements. Base URL: https://reactor-api.keugenek.workers.dev
